addedNeedles.addSutureNeedlesInstructions: To add suture needles, take a suture needle pack and scan it. Then present the needles to the SCR by either placing them in the drop zone for visual confirmation or handing them over directly while maintaining positive visual contact.
addedNeedles.scanPrompt: Scan Digital Matrix Code on Suture Needle Wrapper.
addedNeedles.needleScanQuestion: Do you want to add this pack?
addedNeedles.dontTell: Do not tell the number to SCR.
addedNeedles.dropZonePrompt: Place the needles in the designated Sterile Zone and put the empty package in the wrapper collector.
addedNeedles.notConfirmed: The SCR did not confirm the number or type of needles placed in the Sterile Zone. An incorrect needle package may have been introduced.
addedNeedles.startInterim: Start an Interim Count to resolve the discrepancy.
addedNeedles.wastePrompt: The needles in the Drop Zone need to be disposed of. Confirm that the SCR has wasted all needles properly.
addedNeedles.restartNoti: HayScan timed out. To restart the HayScan press the button.

scrAddedNeedles.question: Do you confirm that 2 of these needles were added to the Drop Zone?
scrAddedNeedles.interimQuestion: Interim Count initiated. Put all <0>used</0> suture needles into HayStack. Press 'Confirm' button when done.

scrActionScreen.foundMisplacedNeedleQuestion: Was the needle found in the sterile zone?
scrActionScreen.hayStackPrompt:
Insert the misplaced needle into the HayStack, 
then press the + button.
scrActionScreen.blankImage2: Stop and immediately search until the needle is found.

scrSetupScreen.title: Start Count
scrSetupScreen.openKitStep1: Remove top tray of Case Kit containing the HayLoft & 2 HaySnips and place on sterile field.
scrSetupScreen.openKitStep2: Remove all contents in the bottom of the Case Kit (HayTray, Sterile Arm Drape, CBI Box).
scrSetupScreen.openKitStep3: Keep top tray of Case Kit for Labeled Drop Zone area during case.
scrSetupScreen.openKitDesc: Break the sterile seal and open the kit to expose all components.
scrSetupScreen.removeHaystack: Remove the HayStack from the sterile container.
scrSetupScreen.removeHaystackDesc: Lift HayStack out of the sterile tray using proper sterile technique.
scrSetupScreen.removeHayStackStep1: Unlatch & open top of HayBarn (Sterile Container).
scrSetupScreen.removeHayStackStep2: Remove Accessory Components from mounting surfaces inside lids (3 HayBins, 1 HayTrough).
scrSetupScreen.removeHayStackStep3: Lift HayStack vertically & remove from HayBarn.
scrSetupScreen.drapeArm: Instructions on How to Drape the Arm.
scrSetupScreen.drapeArmStep1: Place the sterile drape over the arm.
scrSetupScreen.drapeArmStep2: Fully cover and secure the drape.
scrSetupScreen.drapeArmStep3: Confirm the sterile field is intact.
scrSetupScreen.mountHaystack: Instructions on How to Mount HayStack onto the Arm.
scrSetupScreen.mountHaystackStep1: Position HayStack on the draped arm.
scrSetupScreen.mountHaystackStep2: Secure the device according to the mounting points.
scrSetupScreen.mountHaystackStep3: Confirm the unit is stable and remains sterile.
scrSetupScreen.plugHaystack: How to Plug the HayStack Cord into the ScrubHub.
scrSetupScreen.plugHayStackStep1: SCR is responsible for attaching HayStack power cord to the draped sterile arm and maintaining sterility.
scrSetupScreen.plugHayStackStep2: At the Last attachment point, hand cord to the CIR.
scrSetupScreen.plugHayStackStep3: CIR must plug the now unsterile end of the HayStack power cord into the PD injector on the back of the AIO monitor.
scrSetupScreen.buttonTest: Press all four buttons to verify they are working properly and make sure the 4 lights with icons are working.
scrSetupScreen.buttonTestFailed:
Some of the buttons or lights are not
working properly. Replace the
Haystack
scrSetupScreen.actuatorTestFailed: Some of the buttons aren't working properly. Replace the HayStack.
scrSetupScreen.hayloftInstructions: Collect suture needles from the sterile basin, put them
scrSetupScreen.hayloftInstructions2: into the HayLoft and place it on top of the HayStack.
scrSetupScreen.wait1:
Wait while CIR scans the suture needle
wrappers and drops suture needles in the
sterile basin...
scrSetupScreen.waitCIRScanCaseKit: Wait while CIR scans the new Case Kit...
scrSetupScreen.countTypes2: report the number to the CIR.
scrSetupScreen.countTotal1: Count all suture needles in the Sterile
scrSetupScreen.countTotal2: Field and report the number to CIR.
scrSetupScreen.confirmTotal1: Can you confirm that there are
scrSetupScreen.confirmTotal2: suture needles on the sterile field?
scrSetupScreen.waitTimeout: Wait for timeout to be completed...
scrSetupScreen.cbiHandoff: Remove and Hand Off the CBI Box.
scrSetupScreen.cbiHandoffStep1: Remove the CBI Box from the HayTray.
scrSetupScreen.cbiHandoffStep2: Hand it off to the CIR at the handoff point.
scrSetupScreen.insertHaytray: Instructions on How to Insert the HayTray.
scrSetupScreen.insertHaytrayStep1: Insert the HayTray into the HayStack slot.
scrSetupScreen.insertHaytrayStep2: Ensure it is fully seated and aligned.
scrSetupScreen.insertHaytrayStep3: Confirm the tray is secure before continuing.
scrSetupScreen.insertHaytrayStep4: If the tray does not seat properly or an error is detected, report the issue or indicate that the self-test should start automatically.
scrSetupScreen.countMismatch:
Scanned and field counts do not match.
Check the field for missing or extra suture needles.
scrSetupScreen.noneFound:
If no suture needles are found, recount the number of {{nomenclature}}
suture needles and report the number to the CIR again.
scrSetupScreen.mismatchConfirm2: field count reported to the CIR?
scrSetupScreen.mismatchConfirmQuestion:
of these suture needles were
added to the Drop Zone. Do you
confirm the count?
scrSetupScreen.recount1: Recount all suture needles in the sterile
scrSetupScreen.recount2: field and report the number to CIR again.
scrSetupScreen.assembleStep1: Place HayLoft on top of HayStack.
scrSetupScreen.assembleStep2: Attach HayBins to left side of HayStack using universal mounts.
scrSetupScreen.assembleStep3: Attach HayTrough on leading edge of HayStack using universal mounts.
scrSetupScreen.assembleStep4: Secure both HaySnips to universal mounts on HayTrough.
scrSetupScreen.waitForSurgeonEdit: Wait while CIR adds a new surgeon...
scrSetupScreen.waitStartCount: Wait while CIR initiates the Start Count...
scrSetupScreen.waitNewHayTray: Wait while CIR scans new Case Kit...

cirSetupScreen.title: Start Count
cirSetupScreen.prepareStep1: Present the Case Kit in the sterile fashion.
cirSetupScreen.haystackStep1: Present HayStack in the sterile fashion.
cirSetupScreen.drapeTitle: Instructions on How to Drape the Arm.
cirSetupScreen.drapeStep1: Place the sterile drape over the arm.
cirSetupScreen.drapeStep2: Fully cover and secure the drape.
cirSetupScreen.drapeStep3: Confirm the sterile field is intact.
cirSetupScreen.mountTitle: Instructions on How to Mount HayStack onto the Arm.
cirSetupScreen.mountStep1: Position HayStack on the draped arm.
cirSetupScreen.mountStep2: Secure the device according to the mounting points.
cirSetupScreen.mountStep3: Confirm the unit is stable and remains within the sterile field.
cirSetupScreen.plugTitle: How to Plug the HayStack Cord into the ScrubHub.
cirSetupScreen.plugStep3: Plug the connector into the ScrubHub.
cirSetupScreen.scanPrompt:
Scan Digital Matrix Codes for suture
needle wrappers in the Open drawer.
cirSetupScreen.scanPrompt2: 2. Open Suture Needle wrappers and deposit in the Drop Zone or Sterile Bin.
cirSetupScreen.pickup1: Tell SCR to pick up the suture needles from
cirSetupScreen.pickup2: the sterile basin and place into the HayLoft.
cirSetupScreen.waitSCR: Wait until SCR confirms the number...
cirSetupScreen.countComplete: Initial count completed. Wait for timeout...
cirSetupScreen.waitSelfTest: Wait until the HayStack self-tests are completed...
cirSetupScreen.haystackFailed: Device tests failed. Replace the HayStack.
cirSetupScreen.cbiHandoff: Confirm the handoff of the CBI Box.
cirSetupScreen.cbiStep1: Receive CBI box from SCR in accordance with hospital policy.
cirSetupScreen.cbiStep2: Place the CBI box into the CBI Box Caddy located on the HineSight with proper orientation
cirSetupScreen.replaceEither: Wait while the SCR completes the HayStack tests...
cirSetupScreen.confirmHaystack: Confirm when the replacement HayStack is available.
cirSetupScreen.confirmHaytray: Confirm when the replacement HayTray is available.
cirSetupScreen.assemble: Confirm When HayStack Components Are Assembled.
cirSetupScreen.haytrayWait:
Wait for the SCR to
insert the HayTray...
cirSetupScreen.hayTrayFailed: HayTray tests failed. Replace the HayTray.
cirSetupScreen.restartScannerTitle:
HayScan timed out.
To restart the HayScan press the button below.
cirSetupScreen.scanNewCaseKit: Scan the iTrace mark on the new Case Kit.

scannedList.title: Scan Suture Needle Wrappers in the Open Category
scannedList.newProcedureMessage:
Some needles have already been added in the sterile basin or Sterile Field.
Below are the remaining open suture needles to complete the start count.

confirmCount.askSCR:
Ask SCR for the {{nomenclature}}
count and confirm the number.
confirmCount.dontTell: Do not tell the number to SCR.
confirmCount.mismatchTitle: Ask SCR to check the field for missing or extra suture needles.
confirmCount.mismatchDescription: If no suture needles are found, ask to recount the number of {{nomenclature}} suture needles and report the number.
confirmCount.waitingForSCR: Wait for the SCR to confirm the updates...

totalCount.prompt1: Ask the SCR to count the number of
totalCount.prompt2: suture needles in the Sterile Field and enter
totalCount.prompt: Ask the SCR to count the number of suture needles in the Sterile Field and enter the number here.
totalCount.scrNotConfirm: SCR did not confirm the number.
totalCount.askSCR:
Ask the SCR to state the number clearly, then enter the
number they provide.
totalCount.valueDoesNotMatch: The value doesn't match the needle field number stored in the system.
totalCount.restart: Are you sure you want to get to the previous step? You will have to restart the count from scratch.

logout.twoRoles: Two roles must be logged in to complete Stage 1 (Start Count).
logout.oneRole: At least one role must be logged in to proceed with the Start Count.
logout.restartCount: Logging out will restart the count from scratch.
logout.loggedOutNotification: {{loggedOutUser}} ({{loggedOutRole}}) has logged out. {{remainingUser}} ({{remainingRole}}) is currently responsible for the Start Count setup.

blankImage.noObject1: No object detected by HayStack. Was the Actuator
blankImage.searchText2: Stop and immediately search until the suture needle is found.
blankImage.where: Where was this suture needle found?
blankImage.deposit:
Place the found suture needle in
the HayStack and press the Actuator button

sutureSheetHeader.skipMessage: If you want to keep the original suture sheets skip redundancy.

scrWaiting.login:
Log in to proceed
with the start count.
scrWaiting.wait:

up by CIR...
